speaker: charlie
text: Well there you have it folks, another day where science is pushing boundaries, nature is bouncing back, and human achievement is reaching new heights. From turtle conservation to cosmic mapping, from gene therapy to sporting glory, the world's full of people doing extraordinary things.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely Alex, and isn't it refreshing to focus on the builders rather than the breakers for a change? Tomorrow we'll be back with more stories of innovation, conservation, and the kind of human spirit that makes you proud to be part of this incredible planet.

speaker: charlie
text: Thanks for joining us on ParkSyde Bright Side, where we believe the world's getting better one breakthrough at a time. I'm Alex Mercer.

speaker: alice
text: And I'm Jamie. Keep looking on the bright side Australia!

speaker: charlie
text: We'll catch you tomorrow for another dose of the good stuff. Until then, get out there and make your own bit of bright side news.
